1);\n    set i: int, j: int | 1 <= i <= n && 1 <= j <= m &&\n      ((i, j) in prev ||\n       (i - 1 >= 1 && (i - 1, j) in prev) ||\n       (i + 1 <= n && (i + 1, j) in prev) ||\n       (j - 1 >= 1 && (i, j - 1) in prev) ||\n       (j + 1 <= m && (i, j + 1) in prev))\n    :: (i, j)\n}\n\nghost predicate AllReachWithin(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1\n  requires InGrid(n, m, ti, tj)\n  requires t >= 0\n{\n  var reach := ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t);\n  forall i, j :: 1 <= i <= n && 1 <= j <= m ==> (i, j) in reach\n}\n\nfunction Abs(x: int): int\n{\n  if x >= 0 then x else -x\n}\n\n// Monotonicity: ReachableWithin(t-1) ⊆ ReachableWithin(t)\nlemma ReachableMonotone(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int, i: int, j: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1 && InGrid(n, m, ti, tj) && t >= 1\n  requires (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1)\n  ensures (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t)\n{\n  // (i,j) in prev is one of the disjuncts; grid bounds follow from membership\n}\n\n// Completeness: Manhattan distance <= t implies reachable within t steps\nlemma ReachableComplete(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int, i: int, j: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1 && InGrid(n, m, ti, tj)\n  requires InGrid(n, m, i, j) && t >= 0\n  requires Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t\n  ensures (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t)\n  decreases t\n{\n  if t == 0 {\n    // Distance 0 means (i,j) = (ti,tj)\n  } else if Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t - 1 {\n    ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j);\n    ReachableMonotone(n, m, ti, tj, t, i, j);\n  } else {\n    // Distance is exactly t >= 1. Step one cell toward target.\n    var prev := ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1);\n    if i > ti {\n      assert Abs(i - 1 - ti) + Abs(j - tj) == t - 1;\n      ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i - 1, j);\n      assert (i - 1, j) in prev;\n    } else if i < ti {\n      assert Abs(i + 1 - ti) + Abs(j - tj) == t - 1;\n      ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i + 1, j);\n      assert (i + 1, j) in prev;\n    } else if j > tj {\n      assert Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - 1 - tj) == t - 1;\n      ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j - 1);\n      assert (i, j - 1) in prev;\n    } else {\n      assert i == ti && j < tj;\n      assert Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j + 1 - tj) == t - 1;\n      ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j + 1);\n      assert (i, j + 1) in prev;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Soundness: reachable within t steps implies Manhattan distance <= t\nlemma ReachableSoundness(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int, i: int, j: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1 && InGrid(n, m, ti, tj) && t >= 0\n  requires (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t)\n  ensures Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t\n  decreases t\n{\n  if t == 0 {\n  } else {\n    var prev := ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1);\n    if (i, j) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j);\n    } else if i - 1 >= 1 && (i - 1, j) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i - 1, j);\n      assert Abs(i - 1 - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t - 1;\n      assert Abs(i - ti) <= Abs(i - 1 - ti) + 1;\n    } else if i + 1 <= n && (i + 1, j) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i + 1, j);\n      assert Abs(i + 1 - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t - 1;\n      assert Abs(i - ti) <= Abs(i + 1 - ti) + 1;\n    } else if j - 1 >= 1 && (i, j - 1) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j - 1);\n      assert Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - 1 - tj) <= t - 1;\n      assert Abs(j - tj) <= Abs(j - 1 - tj) + 1;\n    } else {\n      assert j + 1 <= m && (i, j + 1) in prev;\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j + 1);\n      assert Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j + 1 - tj) <= t - 1;\n      assert Abs(j - tj) <= Abs(j + 1 - tj) + 1;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nmethod PrisonBreak(n: int, m: int, r: int, c: int) returns (time: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1\n  requires InGrid(n, m, r, c)\n  ensures time >= 0\n  ensures AllReachWithin(n, m, r, c, time)\n  ensures time == 0 || !AllReachWithin(n, m, r, c, time - 1)\n{\n  var dr: int;\n  if r - 1 > n - r { dr := r - 1; } else { dr := n - r; }\n  var dc: int;\n  if c - 1 > m - c { dc := c - 1; } else { dc := m - c; }\n  time := dr + dc;\n\n  // Prove AllReachWithin: every cell has Manhattan distance <= time to (r,c)\n  forall i, j | 1 <= i <= n && 1 <= j <= m\n    ensures (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, r, c, time)\n  {\n    assert Abs(i - r) <= dr;\n    assert Abs(j - c) <= dc;\n    ReachableComplete(n, m, r, c, time, i, j);\n  }\n\n  // Prove optimality: the farthest corner has Manhattan distance exactly time\n  if time > 0 {\n    var ci: int;\n    var cj: int;\n    if dr == r - 1 { ci := 1; } else { ci := n; }\n    if dc == c - 1 { cj := 1; } else { cj := m; }\n\n    assert Abs(ci - r) == dr;\n    assert Abs(cj - c) == dc;\n    assert Abs(ci - r) + Abs(cj - c) == time;\n\n    // By contradiction: if corner were reachable in time-1, soundness gives distance <= time-1\n    if (ci, cj) in ReachableWithin(n, m, r, c, time - 1) {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, r, c, time - 1, ci, cj);\n      assert false;\n    }\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":11756,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":11756},"output_tokens":10,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"1effb1b6-b967-45d1-9f4c-b97ef7ce4eb7","uuid":"ab46fdcb-bb04-4ff2-95a6-228be287c380"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773824400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"515fc261-84c1-4a3c-9a38-9db1edd54c10","session_id":"1effb1b6-b967-45d1-9f4c-b97ef7ce4eb7"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017MbrMrWFkkVYSds9GoTmtE","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0137_1415_A/verified.dfy"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"1effb1b6-b967-45d1-9f4c-b97ef7ce4eb7","uuid":"c3049740-c37c-47bf-b5b3-6b716796d1dc","timestamp":"2026-03-18T08:12:07.838Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0137_1415_A/verified.dfy","content":"ghost predicate InGrid(n: int, m: int, i: int, j: int)\n{\n  1 <= i <= n && 1 <= j <= m\n}\n\nghost function ReachableWithin(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int): set<(int, int)>\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1\n  requires InGrid(n, m, ti, tj)\n  requires t >= 0\n  decreases t\n{\n  if t == 0 then\n    {(ti, tj)}\n  else\n    var prev := ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1) in prev) ||\n       (j + 1 <= m && (i, j + 1) in prev))\n    :: (i, j)\n}\n\nghost predicate AllReachWithin(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1\n  requires InGrid(n, m, ti, tj)\n  requires t >= 0\n{\n  var reach := ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t);\n  forall i, j :: 1 <= i <= n && 1 <= j <= m ==> (i, j) in reach\n}\n\nfunction Abs(x: int): int\n{\n  if x >= 0 then x else -x\n}\n\n// Monotonicity: ReachableWithin(t-1) ⊆ ReachableWithin(t)\nlemma ReachableMonotone(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int, i: int, j: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1 && InGrid(n, m, ti, tj) && t >= 1\n  requires (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t\n  ensures (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t)\n  decreases t\n{\n  if t == 0 {\n    // Distance 0 means (i,j) = (ti,tj)\n  } else if Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t - 1 {\n    ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j);\n    ReachableMonotone(n, m, ti, tj, t, i, j);\n  } else {\n    // Distance is exactly t >= 1. 1, j);\n      assert (i - 1, j) in prev;\n    } else if i < ti {\n      assert Abs(i + 1 - ti) + Abs(j - tj) == t - 1;\n      ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i + 1, j);\n      assert (i + 1, j) in prev;\n    } else if j > tj {\n      assert Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - 1 - tj) == t - 1;\n      ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j - 1);\n      assert (i, j - 1) in prev;\n    } else {\n      assert i == ti && j < tj;\n      assert Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j + 1 - tj) == t - 1;\n      ReachableComplete(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j + 1);\n      assert (i, j + 1) in prev;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Soundness: reachable within t steps implies Manhattan distance <= t\nlemma ReachableSoundness(n: int, m: int, ti: int, tj: int, t: int, i: int, j: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1 && InGrid(n, m, ti, tj) && t >= 0\n  requires (i, j) in ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t)\n  ensures Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t\n  decreases t\n{\n  if t == 0 {\n  } else {\n    var prev := ReachableWithin(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1);\n    if (i, j) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j);\n    } else if i - 1 >= 1 && (i - 1, j) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i - 1, j);\n      assert Abs(i - 1 - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t - 1;\n      assert Abs(i - ti) <= Abs(i - 1 - ti) + 1;\n    } else if i + 1 <= n && (i + 1, j) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i + 1, j);\n      assert Abs(i + 1 - ti) + Abs(j - tj) <= t - 1;\n      assert Abs(i - ti) <= Abs(i + 1 - ti) + 1;\n    } else if j - 1 >= 1 && (i, j - 1) in prev {\n      ReachableSoundness(n, m, ti, tj, t - 1, i, j + 1);\n      assert Abs(i - ti) + Abs(j + 1 - tj) <= t - 1;\n      assert Abs(j - tj) <= Abs(j + 1 - tj) + 1;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nmethod PrisonBreak(n: int, m: int, r: int, c: int) returns (time: int)\n  requires n >= 1 && m >= 1\n  requires InGrid(n, m, r, c)\n  ensures time >= 0\n  ensures AllReachWithin(n, m, r, c, time)\n  ensures time == 0 || !AllReachWithin(n, m, r, c, time - r) <= dr;\n    assert Abs(j - c) <= dc;\n    ReachableComplete(n, m, r, c, time, i, j);\n  }\n\n  // Prove optimality: the farthest corner has Manhattan distance exactly time\n  if time > 0 {\n    var ci: int;\n    var cj: int;\n    if dr == r -
